summary: Tested new AI Draft Quote feature end-to-end (backend + frontend). Backend POST /api/documents/ai-draft returns structured JSON with line items, destination, port, notes and computed subtotal/fees_total/customs_total/tax_total/grand_total. UI flow verified: AI modal opens (ai-draft-btn), client select + description work, Generate Draft (run-ai-draft) calls backend, response pre-fills the existing document editor, Save Document creates EXD-Q-00003, and generate-{id} produces a watermarked PDF (status flips to 'generated', pdf_file_id set on the doc). Whole chain (AI draft -> save -> PDF) works without errors.

issues: Client Name input has no data-testid; label-based selection is currently the only way to fill it programmatically. Minor testability gap — recommend adding data-testid='doc-client-name' etc. to top-level editor inputs.

action_items: Optional UX: when the AI draft is generated without a linked client, the editor Client Name field stays empty and Save fails with 'Client name is required'. Consider either (a) auto-populating a placeholder ('Prospect') so save succeeds without extra typing, or (b) surfacing a clearer inline hint next to the required field. Not blocking.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py ai_draft_document: JSON parsing is defensive (strips ``` fences, slices to outermost braces) — good.
AI helper is called with a unique session id per draft (draft-{uuid}) so context is not shared across drafts — good.
Documents.jsx runAiDraft correctly spreads EMPTY + AI data and defensively falls back to a single empty line if line_items is empty.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test client via POST /api/clients: TEST_UI Client (UITest LLC, id 6a5bb8a6fdd01c537c0a841f) and 1 quote EXD-Q-00003 with generated PDF. Safe to leave or delete.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 verified the new AI Draft Quote feature. Backend endpoint /api/documents/ai-draft returns proper structure and totals. UI flow: ai-draft-btn -> ai-draft-desc/ai-draft-client -> run-ai-draft -> pre-filled editor -> save-doc -> generate-{id} all confirmed working. EXD-Q-00003 exists in DB with pdf_file_id and status='generated'. Only tested one AI call (as requested) to conserve credits.
